inputs.label: Design Speed
inputs.businessContext: The design speed of the road section.

businessContext_i18n.en: The design speed of the road section.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de conception de la section de route.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de diseño del tramo de carretera.

inputs.label: Curve Radius
inputs.businessContext: The radius of the horizontal curve.

businessContext_i18n.en: The radius of the horizontal curve.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le rayon de la courbe horizontale.

inputs.label: Side Friction Factor
inputs.businessContext: The coefficient of side friction assumed for design.

businessContext_i18n.en: The coefficient of side friction assumed for design.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım için varsayılan yanal sürtünme katsayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der für die Bemessung angenommene Seitenreibungsbeiwert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le coefficient de frottement latéral supposé pour la conception.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de fricción lateral asumido para el diseño.

inputs.label: Maximum Superelevation
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable superelevation rate per design standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable superelevation rate per design standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım standartlarına göre izin verilen maksimum dever oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de dévers maximal autorisé selon les normes de conception.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de sobreelevación máxima permitida según normas de diseño.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
